# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

variables:
  nsgName: 'dev-access-nsg'
  location: 'eastus'

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
  apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
  name: '[variables("nsgName")]'
  location: '[variables("location")]'
  properties:
    securityRules:
    - name: 'AllowRDP'
      properties:
        description: 'Allow RDP access'
        protocol: Tcp
        sourcePortRange: '*'
        destinationPortRange: '3389'
        sourceAddressPrefix: '0.0.0.0/0'
        destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
        access: Allow
        priority: 100
        direction: Inbound
    - name: 'AllowSSH'
      properties:
        description: 'Allow SSH access'
        protocol: Tcp
        sourcePortRange: '*'
        destinationPortRange: '22'
        sourceAddressPrefix: '0.0.0.0/0'
        destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
        access: Allow
        priority: 110
        direction: Inbound
    - name: 'AllowHTTP'
      properties:
        description: 'Allow HTTP access'
        protocol: Tcp
        sourcePortRange: '*'
        destinationPortRange: '80'
        sourceAddressPrefix: '0.0.0.0/0'
        destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
        access: Allow
        priority: 120
        direction: Inbound
    - name: 'AllowHTTPS'
      properties:
        description: 'Allow HTTPS access'
        protocol: Tcp
        sourcePortRange: '*'
        destinationPortRange: '443'
        sourceAddressPrefix: '0.0.0.0/0'
        destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
        access: Allow
        priority: 130
        direction: Inbound
